## Molds.MoldsLibrary class

Multi-source mold library with type-safe access

Wraps AggregatedResultMap to provide: - Composite ID access (e.g., "cw.chocolate-world-cw-2227") - Multi-source management (built-in, user, app-local, etc.) - Mutable vs immutable collection distinction - Weakly-typed validating access for external data

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class MoldsLibrary extends SubLibraryBase<MoldId, BaseMoldId, Mold> 
```
**Extends:** [SubLibraryBase](./ts-chocolate.librarydata.sublibrarybase.md)<!-- -->&lt;[MoldId](./ts-chocolate.moldid.md)<!-- -->, [BaseMoldId](./ts-chocolate.basemoldid.md)<!-- -->, [Mold](./ts-chocolate.molds.mold.md)<!-- -->&gt;
